agent.name: performance-cost-auditor
agent.role: Re-audit composite index decision (f-ed623fc2) on scoped migration only.

findings.title: Should findings have a composite index on (project_id, status, created_at)?
findings.description: Migration 20260407210000_findings_index_repair_jobs_grants.sql adds idx_findings_project_status_created_at on (project_id, status, created_at DESC), matching the list-query pattern described in the original finding. EXPLAIN ANALYZE on production-like data remains optional follow-up.

proof_hooks.summary: CREATE INDEX idx_findings_project_status_created_at ON findings (project_id, status, created_at DESC)
Legacy separate indexes idx_findings_project and idx_findings_status still in 20260402163739_lyra_schema.sql; composite supplements rather than replaces unless a later migration drops singles.

history.notes: Re-audit: composite index migration present and documented in-file.
